notes: Generates a minimal Vite webapp with importer-scoped lockfile labeling and Buck/Nix integration.
Includes a default nix_node_test target (unit) using Vitest; opt out of sample tests with --no-tests.
Use pnpm dev for HMR. Production builds are hermetic via Nix + Buck.
Reserved SSR template names: webapp-ssr-express and webapp-ssr-next.
